personalInfo.name: Habib Syuhada
personalInfo.title: Senior IT Programmer / Development Lead
personalInfo.tagline: Senior IT Programmer with 7+ years of experience developing enterprise web, mobile, and digital systems across manufacturing, EPC, and oil & gas industries.
personalInfo.about: Senior IT Programmer with 7+ years of experience in developing enterprise web, mobile, and digital systems across manufacturing, EPC, and oil & gas industries. Experienced in leading development teams, delivering internal business applications, and driving digital transformation initiatives to improve operational efficiency and process accuracy. Strong hands-on expertise in full-stack development, system integration, database management, and application support.

experience.description: Years of experience in enterprise software development

projects.title: Attendance Device Management System
projects.description: A centralized system for monitoring and managing attendance devices across multiple locations. Enables fast synchronization of facial recognition data between machines and collects attendance records in real time.

projects.title: Digital Land Reservation Platform
projects.description: A digital platform for booking land parcels for reservation. Users can select and map the land they want to rent, with visibility into land usage across past, current, and future periods.

projects.title: Vehicle Entry and Exit Monitoring System
projects.description: A gate monitoring system integrated with cameras to record vehicle entry and exit activities. Uses OCR technology to automatically identify vehicles passing through the gate.

projects.title: Safety Observation AI
projects.description: An AI-based computer vision system connected to surveillance cameras to detect workplace safety violations such as missing safety equipment and restricted-area breaches.

projects.title: Role Based Access Control System
projects.description: An access management system for handling user roles and permissions across multiple enterprise applications. Supports 20+ applications and manages access for over 1,000 users.

projects.title: Portal and Announcement Board
projects.description: A centralized portal connecting dozens of internal applications in a single place. Serves as an internal communication hub for company announcements and notifications.

projects.title: Server Monitoring Dashboard
projects.description: A server monitoring dashboard built with Grafana and Prometheus to track the health and performance of 15+ servers in real time for early issue detection.

projects.title: Project Control Management Mobile App
projects.description: A mobile application for project operations including quality inspections, activity reporting, security patrol records, and warehouse material management. Published on Google Play.

projects.title: HSE Mobile Application
projects.description: A mobile application for workplace safety and HSE compliance. Features incident reporting, safety audits, HSE checklists, and compliance tracking.

projects.title: Engineering Document Control System
projects.description: A system to manage engineering drawing files and track the drawing creation workflow. Enables quick search for drawings and monitors engineer KPI performance.

projects.title: Warehouse Management System
projects.description: A warehouse management system for stock control, goods receiving, shipment processing, and inventory tracking to improve warehouse efficiency.

projects.title: Safety Helmet Detection System
projects.description: A computer vision system to detect whether workers are wearing safety helmets in the workplace using image and video stream analysis.

projects.title: Human Resource Management System
projects.description: An HR management system supporting overtime management, attendance tracking, leave requests, and administrative processes.

projects.title: Production and Quality Management System
projects.description: A system for managing production processes and quality control activities including production recording and quality inspections.

projects.title: Share Folder System
projects.description: A web-based system connected to an FTP server for managing user access and directory permissions with secure file access control.
